subject: test(tripwire): lock chroma-filtering invariants + strengthen repo color fix
body:
Add regression guard verifying expected colorful-token counts per
registered theme (test 43/65). Catches DaisyUI upgrades that shift a
token's chroma across the 0.03 threshold.

Also: console.warn in the zero-colorful-tokens fallback path (surfaces
broken custom themes during dev), stale doc updates replacing "8-slot"
references with the dual-cycle design (general 8-token + filtered
repo-specific 7-token), caramellatte neutral discovery documented.

Tags: testing, charts, theme, documentation
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theming
Semver: patch
